comment: Desired Airtable schema, applied additively by apply-schema.js (Meta API cannot delete tables/fields or change field types — removals are manual). The existing Vacancies table is intentionally NOT managed here.

tables.name: RawEmails
tables.description: Queue of regex-cleaned job-alert emails, populated by apps-script/gmail-collector.gs. Claude's screening pipeline reads Status=New rows and flips them to Processed. Mirrors the Make.com Sheets columns A-M.

fields.name: CleanText
fields.description: Regex-cleaned body; truncated only at Airtable's 100k long-text limit

fields.name: TrackersFound
fields.description: Distinct known-tracker URLs detected in this email, post junk-filter (resolution-rate denominator)

fields.name: TrackersResolved
fields.description: Of TrackersFound, how many resolved to a canonical (non-tracker) URL and were swapped into CleanText in place

tables.name: Vacancies_test
tables.description: Sandbox mirror of Vacancies for dry-run pipeline sessions (roadmap M5). Same fields as the real Vacancies table; safe to wipe.
